description_long: This is a belt-fed, military-style rifle with a long, black metal barrel and a wooden thumbhole stock. The receiver is robust and features a visible ammunition belt feeding into the chamber from a green box magazine mounted beneath. The rifle has a prominent front sight post and a rear iron sight, both made of metal. The handguard and grip are also constructed from wood, providing a classic, rugged appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a matte finish on the metal surfaces. The rifle is designed for sustained fire and is typically used in support roles.
description: A belt-fed, military-style rifle with a long black barrel, wooden thumbhole stock, and a green box magazine. Features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Partial side view showing the black barrel, wooden stock, and the green box magazine with the ammunition belt visible.
description_view_1: Full side profile highlighting the entire length of the rifle, the wooden thumbhole stock, and the attached box magazine.
description_view_2: Front-on view showing the barrel's end, the front sight post, and the width of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the wooden stock, the length of the barrel, and the feeding mechanism.
